name: Graphs
description: Master graph representations, BFS/DFS traversals, and connectivity components.
learning_objectives: Navigate multi-linked networks using search matrices
Identify disconnected islands or clusters inside a grid using graph traversals

patterns.name: Graph Traversal
patterns.description: Visit connected vertices recursively using adjacency list parameters.

concepts.name: BFS / DFS on Graphs
concepts.theory_markdown:
# BFS / DFS on Graphs

Graph traversal allows traversing nodes that can be connected in cycle structures. Unlike trees, we must keep track of a `visited` set to avoid infinite loops.

### The Island Counting Idea

Treat grid as a graph. When '1' is encountered, trigger DFS to visit all adjacent '1's and flip them to '0's (or add to visited) to sink the island. Increment island count.
learning_objectives: Maintain visited sets during vertex scanning
Apply search updates to grid matrix parameters
